groups.name: Modern American Canasta
groups.notes: Scraped Mar 12 10:30 PM - 2 new entries. FB071 (Susie Linder Rozanczyk, melding dirty/clean aces after partner's mismeld - clean aces unanimous NO due to knowledge contamination, dirty aces split with penalty, extends to wilds/7s, 6 comments). FB072 (Shoshana Fluss Pilevsky, wilds in zip code special hand - overwhelmingly a TABLE RULE, default allows matching wilds, some groups ban to increase difficulty, 20 comments strong majority). Skipped: Sue Tucker (LFG Bucks County), Lynda Greenberg (LFG Delray).

groups.name: Canasta Lovers
groups.notes: Scraped Mar 12 10:30 PM - 0 new entries. No new rules/strategy content since Mar 9. Feed dominated by event promos (Shuffle Sisters, MAC Con, Miraval), product promos (napkin holders, scorekeeper bling, card spinners), LFG posts (Delray, Spring Hill), welcome/social posts, tournament promos, Canasta scoring app recommendations. The Rumasta variant mention (Jasmin Hicks) was social/casual, not a rules debate. Next scrape Mar 14.
